nl_query: List results computed using the MIN rule.
failed_sql: SELECT r.id, r.script_id, r.final_marks, r.computation_rule, r.source_attempt_ids, r.published_at, au.display_name FROM result r LEFT JOIN app_user au ON au.id = r.published_by WHERE r.board_id = :board_id AND r.published_at IS NOT NULL AND r.computation_rule = 'MIN' ORDER BY r.published_at DESC LIMIT 500;
